summary: In this course, you will learn step by step how to configure the main simulation parameters in PoligonSoft, run the calculation, obtain the results, and analyze them correctly.
actions:
Mesh model import and review of common errors.
Material assignment to the model bodies.
Adjustment of heat transfer parameters and boundary conditions.
Definition of the main simulation parameters.
Calculation run and results analysis.
expected: As a result, you will obtain the solidification dynamics of the casting, locate hot spot areas, and review the prediction of shrinkage defects.
